summary: Lucent hostage-feed release loop concluded with Juno on the safe line, security held behind the collars, Sol categorized for non-contact protective handoff, and edit-trail evidence preserved as the live aftermath hook.
strengths: Sequential state carryover materially changed action affordances.
Subagents produced actions and speech without raw state soup.
Dark comedy stayed tied to danger rather than dissolving it.
limitations: Opening turns before the restart are context/rehearsal, not counted as training-clean receipts.
Appraisals and mutations are manual coordinator artifacts and remain future model-training targets.
No branch compiler or IF artifact was produced in this pass.
